name: parapara1_loop
note: Para Para dance v2, 24-frame seamless loop at 12FPS (2s per cycle). Signature Para Para move: ALTERNATING straight-arm diagonal thrusts — one arm shoots out PERFECTLY STRAIGHT toward an upper corner while the other hand is pulled in flat against the upper chest; then they swap. Rules for EVERY frame: hands are always OPEN and FLAT with fingers together and extended (never fists); an extended arm is perfectly STRAIGHT with no elbow bend; the resting hand lies flat against her upper chest with the elbow tucked down; her arms NEVER cross in front of her face; LOWER BODY nearly stationary — feet planted about shoulder-width apart, flat on the floor, only a gentle rhythmic knee bounce and tiny heel lifts, NO jumping, NO squatting, NO stepping. Beat map (3 frames per beat, 8 beats): 0-2 thrust image-LEFT arm to upper-left / 3-5 swap, thrust image-RIGHT arm to upper-right / 6-8 thrust image-LEFT again / 9-11 thrust image-RIGHT again / 12-14 both arms out in a T / 15-17 wrists cross at chest / 18-20 both arms fling up into a high V / 21-23 sweep down and return to start. Frame wording uses IMAGE-side directions (viewer's left/right) with dual labels for the active arm.
frames: Pose: dancing Para Para, loop start: standing with her feet planted about shoulder-width apart, flat on the floor, knees slightly dipped at the bottom of a gentle bounce. BOTH open flat hands are pulled in and resting flat against her upper chest, elbows bent and tucked down at her sides, fingers together and extended. Confident happy idol smile, eyes bright, chin level. No jump, no squat — all motion is in her arms and a gentle knee bounce. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para: HER RIGHT arm (the arm on the LEFT side of the image) is shooting out toward the upper-LEFT corner of the image and is halfway extended, elbow almost straight, open flat hand palm down; HER LEFT hand (on the RIGHT side of the image) stays pulled in, resting flat against her upper chest with the elbow tucked down. Body rising out of the knee dip. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Bright focused smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, key pose: HER RIGHT arm (the arm on the LEFT side of the image) is FULLY extended, PERFECTLY STRAIGHT with no elbow bend, pointing diagonally UP toward the upper-LEFT corner of the image at about 45 degrees, open flat hand with palm down and fingers together and extended; HER LEFT hand (on the RIGHT side of the image) is pulled in, lying flat against her upper chest, elbow tucked down. Body tall at the top of the bounce, head turned slightly toward the raised hand. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Big joyful smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, holding the same key pose with a small bounce DOWN: HER RIGHT arm (the arm on the LEFT side of the image) still FULLY extended and PERFECTLY STRAIGHT toward the upper-LEFT corner at 45 degrees, flat hand palm down; HER LEFT hand still flat against her upper chest, elbow tucked. Knees dipping slightly so the whole body sits a touch lower, head still turned a little toward the raised hand. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Big joyful smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, the swap: HER RIGHT arm (the arm on the LEFT side of the image) is retracting, half bent, its flat hand halfway back to her chest; at the same time HER LEFT arm (the arm on the RIGHT side of the image) is shooting out toward the upper-RIGHT corner of the image, halfway extended, elbow almost straight, flat hand palm down. The two hands pass at chest height on their own sides of her body, never crossing in front of her face. Body rising in the bounce. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Bright smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, key pose (mirror): HER LEFT arm (the arm on the RIGHT side of the image) is FULLY extended, PERFECTLY STRAIGHT with no elbow bend, pointing diagonally UP toward the upper-RIGHT corner of the image at about 45 degrees, open flat hand palm down, fingers together and extended; HER RIGHT hand (on the LEFT side of the image) is pulled in, lying flat against her upper chest, elbow tucked down. Body tall at the top of the bounce, head turned slightly toward the raised hand. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Big joyful smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, holding the mirror key pose with a small bounce DOWN: HER LEFT arm (the arm on the RIGHT side of the image) still FULLY extended and PERFECTLY STRAIGHT toward the upper-RIGHT corner at 45 degrees, flat hand palm down; HER RIGHT hand still flat against her upper chest, elbow tucked. Knees dipping slightly, head still turned a little toward the raised hand. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Big joyful smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, the swap back: HER LEFT arm (the arm on the RIGHT side of the image) is retracting, half bent, its flat hand halfway back to her chest; at the same time HER RIGHT arm (the arm on the LEFT side of the image) is shooting out again toward the upper-LEFT corner of the image, halfway extended, elbow almost straight, flat hand palm down. Hands stay on their own sides, never crossing in front of her face. Body rising in the bounce. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Bright smile. Body tall at the top of the bounce, head turned slightly toward the raised hand, hair swinging a little. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Open-mouth joyful smile. Knees dipping slightly, body a touch lower. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Joyful smile. Hands stay on their own sides of her body, never crossing in front of her face. Body rising in the bounce. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Bright smile. Pose: dancing Para Para, key pose (mirror repeat): HER LEFT arm (the arm on the RIGHT side of the image) FULLY extended, PERFECTLY STRAIGHT, pointing diagonally UP toward the upper-RIGHT corner of the image at about 45 degrees, open flat hand palm down; HER RIGHT hand (on the LEFT side of the image) pulled in flat against her upper chest, elbow tucked down. Body tall at the top of the bounce, head turned slightly toward the raised hand. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Open-mouth joyful smile. Pose: dancing Para Para, gathering: BOTH open flat hands are pulled in together, resting flat against her upper chest, elbows bent and tucked down at her sides — the same compact position as the loop start. Knees dipped at the bottom of the bounce. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Cheeky anticipating smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, T pose opening: BOTH arms extending straight out horizontally to their own sides at exactly shoulder height — HER RIGHT arm points to the LEFT side of the image and HER LEFT arm points to the RIGHT side of the image — both arms PERFECTLY STRAIGHT, open flat hands with palms down, fingers together and extended. IMPORTANT: BOTH arms are extended, the pose is symmetric like the letter T. Body rising in the bounce. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Radiant smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, T pose held with a small bounce DOWN: BOTH arms still straight out horizontally to their own sides at shoulder height, symmetric like the letter T, flat hands palms down. Knees dipping slightly, hair settling. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Radiant smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, folding in: both forearms folding inward from the T pose — each open flat hand travels toward the OPPOSITE shoulder, forearms angling across her upper chest, elbows still lifted. The hands are at collarbone height in front of her chest, well below her face. Body rising slightly. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Playful smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, crossed pose: both wrists CROSSED in an X in front of her chest at collarbone height — each flat hand near the opposite shoulder, palms toward her body, elbows out. The cross is at CHEST height, well below her face. Knees dipped at the bottom of the bounce, head tilted a tiny bit. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Cheeky closed-eye smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, uncrossing: the crossed wrists spring apart — both open flat hands sweeping outward and upward past her shoulders, arms half extended toward the upper corners of the image, palms turning forward. Body rising in the bounce. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Growing bright smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, high V key pose: BOTH arms flung fully open and UP into a wide V shape — HER RIGHT arm points toward the upper-LEFT corner of the image and HER LEFT arm points toward the upper-RIGHT corner, both arms PERFECTLY STRAIGHT, open flat hands above head height with palms facing forward, fingers together and extended. IMPORTANT: BOTH arms are raised, the pose is symmetric. Body at its tallest, heels lifted a little off the floor. Feet shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Huge open-mouth joyful smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, high V held with a small bounce DOWN: BOTH arms still fully raised in the symmetric wide V, straight, open flat hands above head height, palms forward. Heels settling back onto the floor, knees softening slightly, hair settling. Feet shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Huge joyful smile, flushed cheeks. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, sweeping down: BOTH straight arms lowering symmetrically from the high V through the horizontal — both arms now extended straight out to their own sides at just above shoulder height, flat hands with palms down, on their way down. Knees dipping gently. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Warm happy smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, low V: BOTH straight arms lowered symmetrically to point diagonally DOWN and out to their own sides, about 45 degrees below shoulder height, open flat hands with palms facing back, fingers extended. Body settling in the bounce. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Content smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, drawing in: both elbows bending as both open flat hands travel inward and upward toward her upper chest, forearms rising on their own sides, hands at stomach-to-chest height. Knees softening into the dip. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, no jump, no squat. Content happy smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: dancing Para Para, returning to the loop-start pose: BOTH open flat hands pulled in and resting flat against her upper chest, elbows bent and tucked down at her sides, fingers together and extended, knees slightly dipped at the bottom of the gentle bounce — matching the first frame exactly for a seamless loop. Feet planted shoulder-width apart, flat on the floor, no jump, no squat. Confident happy idol smile. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.
